title: Bridge Essay: Incubation and interactivity in insight problem solving.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Knowledge/Gnosis** (Phase 14) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Knowledge/Gnosis to mechanistic neuroscience through Incubation, and, interactivity, in, insight.

**Incubation and interactivity in insight problem solving.** — Psychol Res. PMID: 29480412. DOI: 10.1007/s00426-018-0992-9. Insight is commonly viewed as originating from the restructuring of amental representation. Distributed cognition frameworks such as the Systemic Thinking Model, however, assumes that information processing can be transformed when it is distributed across mental and material resources.
